text.title: AI Plugin Ecosystem (Figma) Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to apply the ai-plugin-ecosystem methodology end-to-end.

step.name: frame-task-list
step.action: Pull list of recurring design tasks with frequency + cost. Cap shortlist at 5 high-frequency tasks.

step.name: shortlist-plugins
step.action: Identify 3-7 candidate plugins per task; record version, vendor, data-flow path.
step.decision-gate: If no candidate matches a task, mark task non-pluginable and exit.

step.name: evaluate-against-rules
step.action: Apply each rule (r1..r7): boundary, brand-style pre-set, attestation, contrast, version pin, brand-fit, data privacy.

step.name: decide-and-record
step.action: Write ADR: adopted plugins, rejected plugins, rationale, guardrails (mandatory pre-flight, mandatory post-flight).
step.decision-gate: If no plugin passes guardrails, decision = 'no adoption'; revisit in 90 days.
